# Hyades

> Plain-text typesetting engine. Renders LaTeX-like source into Unicode/ASCII text art for terminals, code comments, emails, and documentation.

> Try it live: [Hyades Playground](<!-- PLAYGROUND_URL -->)

## What It Does

Hyades takes input like `$$\frac{a}{b}$$` and produces:

```
 𝑎
───
 𝑏
```

It supports math (fractions, integrals, matrices, Greek letters), tables with box-drawing frames, lists, flex-like layout (hbox/vbox), user-defined macros, and computation (variables, loops, functions).

## Two Binaries

- **hyades** — renders `.hy` source files (or stdin) to stdout
- **cassilda** — document processor for `.cld` files with embedded rendering

## Quick Start

```bash
# Direct rendering
echo '$$\sum_{i=1}^n i^2$$' | hyades

# Document processing
cassilda render doc.cld label_name
```

## MCP Server

An MCP server is available for AI assistants to render math expressions:

- **Remote**: `https://hyades-mcp.apg.workers.dev/mcp` (Streamable HTTP, no install)
- **Local**: `hyades-mcp` binary over stdio (offline, included in release)

```json
{ "mcpServers": { "hyades": { "url": "https://hyades-mcp.apg.workers.dev/mcp" } } }
```
or
```json
{ "mcpServers": { "hyades": { "command": "/path/to/hyades-mcp" } } }
```

## Full Documentation

For complete syntax reference with examples, see: llms-full.txt
